message:
feat(widgets): add KeybindingHints widget with category-based grouping

Implement HelpCategory enum and KeybindingHints widget for context-aware
keybinding display with category headers. Wire into chrome help overlay
using categorized entries with bracketed key format. Add 20 E2E tests
and 26 unit/property tests for the new widget.

Closes bd-2qbx.3, bd-2qbx.6.

Also fixes pre-existing clippy lints in textarea.rs and rope.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
